data.text:
Great! Let’s get you set up for the quiz.

1) What grade are you in? 
2) What subject would you like to be quizzed on (math, science, history, English/Language Arts, geography, etc.)? 
3) What difficulty level do you prefer: easy (1-3), medium (4-5), or hard (6-8)? 

Please share your answers in that order (e.g., Grade 7; Math; Medium).
